recommendations.title: Bolt
recommendations.overview: Bolt is the star of the biggest show in Hollywood. The only problem is, he thinks it's real. After he's accidentally shipped to New York City and separated from Penny, his beloved co-star and owner, Bolt must harness all his "super powers" to find a

recommendations.title: Big Hero 6
recommendations.overview: A special bond develops between plus-sized inflatable robot Baymax, and prodigy Hiro Hamada, who team up with a group of friends to form a band of high-tech heroes.

recommendations.title: The Sea Beast
recommendations.overview: When a young girl stows away on the ship of a legendary sea monster hunter, they launch an epic journey into uncharted waters — and make history to boot.

recommendations.title: Don Juan DeMarco
recommendations.overview: John Arnold DeMarco is a man who believes he is Don Juan, the greatest lover in the world. Clad in a cape and mask, DeMarco undergoes psychiatric treatment with Dr. Jack Mickler to cure him of his apparent delusion. But the psychiatric sessions have

recommendations.title: Theater Camp
recommendations.overview: After the indomitable and beloved founder of a scrappy theater camp in upstate New York falls into a coma, the eccentric staff must band together with her clueless "crypto-bro" son to keep the thespian paradise afloat.

recommendations.title: Al posto tuo
recommendations.overview: Two very different men have something in common: the work. When their companies are bought by a bigger one, who will take the only place of boss of the new company?

recommendations.title: Slaxx
recommendations.overview: When a possessed pair of jeans begins to kill the staff of a trendy clothing store, it is up to Libby, an idealistic young salesclerk, to stop its bloody rampage.

recommendations.title: The Kissing Booth
recommendations.overview: When teenager Elle's first kiss leads to a forbidden romance with the hottest boy in high school, she risks her relationship with her best friend.

recommendations.title: Avalanche Sharks
recommendations.genres: Horror, Action, Science Fiction, Adventure, Comedy
recommendations.overview: A snow avalanche awakens humungous, prehistoric sharks that proceed to chomp on bikini clad co-eds.

recommendations.title: The Joneses
recommendations.overview: A seemingly perfect family moves into a suburban neighborhood, but when it comes to the truth as to why they're living there, they don't exactly come clean with their neighbors.
